title: INTERACTIVE FOUNTAINS - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION INTERACTIVE FOUNTAINS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides interactive fountains to the public as a way to cool off when temperatures are dangerously warm.
